objects.name: Analytic 2064
objects.description: Detection identifies execution of scripts containing high concentrations of invisible Unicode characters followed by decoding or interpretation behaviors (e.g., base64 decode, eval) and subsequent process or network activity. Emphasis is placed on mismatch between file entropy/structure and execution output.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: auditd:SYSCALL
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: stat and lstat syscall results on files, including inode and permission info

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: auditd:EXECVE
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: execve of script/interpreter (bash, python, node) with suspicious encoded or non-printable content

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Useful for tuning sections containing high entropy indicative of Unicode sequences
